SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Our Columbus Flooring Story

Founded in 2012, Horizon Flooring began as a small crew serving German Village's historic homes. We've grown to become Franklin County's trusted flooring specialists, preserving the character of Columbus neighborhoods while incorporating modern durability.

Our approach combines meticulous craftsmanship with climate-appropriate materials. We test every product against Ohio's extreme seasonal shifts before recommending it to homeowners.

When we're not installing floors, you'll find our team volunteering at Habitat for Humanity builds or sponsoring local arts events in the Short North.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Flooring

Climate-Adaptive Materials

We use flooring specifically engineered to handle Columbus' freeze-thaw cycles and summer humidity without warping or cracking.

Neighborhood Specialists

From Dublin's upscale subdivisions to Clintonville's historic homes, we understand each area's unique architectural needs.

Full-Service Solutions

Complete projects from subfloor prep to final molding, including moisture barrier installation for Ohio's clay soil areas.

Local Supply Chain

90% of our materials come from Midwestern manufacturers, reducing lead times and supporting regional businesses.

Schedule Your Free Flooring Assessment

Our Columbus-based consultants will evaluate your space and recommend the perfect flooring solution for your lifestyle and budget.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-flo-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

The team restored our 1937 German Village hardwood to stunning condition. They matched the original finish perfectly and addressed all the squeaks that developed over 80 Ohio winters. The floors look brand new but maintain their historic charm.

Sarah K. Hardwood Floor Refinishing
“

Our Dublin basement flooded twice last spring, ruining the carpet. Horizon installed LVP that looks like real wood but handles moisture perfectly. When we had another heavy rain, the floors wiped clean with no damage. Life-changing for Ohio homeowners!

James T. Luxury Vinyl Plank Installation
“

The tile in our Clintonville sunroom had cracked from years of temperature swings. Horizon installed gorgeous Ohio-made tiles with a special underlayment system. Two winters later, not a single crack despite the wild temperature changes.

Megan R. Tile Flooring
“

After three failed attempts with other companies, Horizon finally gave us a usable basement floor. Their moisture testing found issues others missed, and the LVP they installed has handled our humid summers perfectly. Worth every penny.

David L. Basement Flooring
“

We needed carpet that could survive two kids and a golden retriever in our Hilliard home. Horizon's recommendation has stood up to a year of muddy paws and juice spills while still looking great. The padding makes it so comfortable underfoot.

Lisa M. Carpet Installation
“

Our Worthington colonial's floors had darkened unevenly over decades. Horizon brought them back to their original honey tone and used a finish that doesn't show winter salt marks. They worked around our antique furniture with incredible care.

Thomas W. Hardwood Floor Refinishing

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does refinishing typically take in my Columbus home?
Most projects take 3-5 days depending on square footage and the home's age. We schedule around Ohio's humidity patterns for optimal drying.
Can you match my existing hardwood in newer additions?
Yes, we maintain relationships with regional mills to source period-appropriate wood for seamless expansions in homes throughout Franklin County.
